title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist and Robin agent systems automate scientific discoveries in medicine, discovering new treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. The systems use self-ranking and consensus mechanisms to identify and validate treatment breakthroughs.
